_schema_doc.description: Multi-scenario test cases for nudge_detection.py — nudge detection pipeline

fields.dgpsTrajectory: Array of DGPS points with ego position, velocity, and timestamp
fields.egoSpeed_mps: Current ego speed in m/s (for VRU safety margin)
fields.nearFieldDeviations: Array of [s_m, l_m] pairs — near field (0-40m), for peak detection
fields.extendedDeviations: Array of [s_m, l_m] pairs — extended field (0-60m), for end detection
fields.objects: Array of preprocessed object info matching PreprocessedObjectInfo fields

notes: s_m = longitudinal distance along lane centerline (Frenet s)
l_m = lateral offset from lane centerline (positive = left, negative = right)
nearFieldDeviations is a PREFIX of extendedDeviations (same points, shorter range)
adaptiveBaseline_m: subtract from l to detrend — 0 means no baseline correction
Object distances are relative to lane centerline, not reference line

single_parked_vehicle_nudge.name: Single parked vehicle — clear leftward nudge
single_parked_vehicle_nudge.notes: 1 peak at 0.65m, 1 object passes all filters, single-object Q1 -> NUDGE. Exercises: peak detection, start/end finding, single-object exceptionality, Q2a+Q2b.

parked_car_row_bias.name: Row of 3 parked cars — bias rejection
parked_car_row_bias.notes: 3 parked cars at similar distances. Peak ~0.47m barely over threshold. Exceptionality ratio ~1.1 < 1.5 -> Q1 fails -> BIAS. Exercises: bias/nudge Q1 rejection with multiple similar objects.

vru_pedestrian_nudge.name: Pedestrian on right — sharp leftward nudge with VRU buffer
vru_pedestrian_nudge.notes: 1 VRU object, adjusted dist = raw 1.2 - 1.0 buffer = 0.2m. Single exceptional -> NUDGE. Exercises: VRU buffer in adjusted distance, VRU safety margin (1.0m at 10mps).

wide_lane_baseline_nudge.name: Wide lane, baseline detrended — rightward nudge to truck on left
wide_lane_baseline_nudge.notes: Wide 5.0m lane, driver biased 0.8m left (baseline). Raw deviations: 0.8m + rightward bump. After detrending by 0.8m baseline, a rightward peak of -0.6m is revealed (truck on left). Exercises: baseline detrending, rightward direction, large vehicle buffer (0.6m).

no_peak_flat_trajectory.name: Straight driving with minor noise — no detection
no_peak_flat_trajectory.notes: Minor noise +/-0.15m, no peak exceeds 0.4m threshold. 0 peaks detected -> early exit, no hypotheses. Exercises: early exit path when no peaks survive filtering.
